WKSH.tuning.title: 🔧 Mod Workshop
WKSH.tuning.warn.noItems: {name} has no weapon/armor with hard points.
WKSH.tuning.mode.intro: On {name}'s gear, what do you want to do?
WKSH.tuning.mode.install: Install an attachment: mount a part on a hard point (difficulty based on rarity).
WKSH.tuning.mode.mod: Activate a mod: improve an already-installed attachment — difficulty increases by 1 per mod already activated on that attachment (book rule).
WKSH.tuning.install.title: 🔧 Tuning — installing an attachment
WKSH.tuning.sum.att: Attachment: {name} — costs {hp} hard point(s), {price} cr, rarity {rarity}.
WKSH.tuning.sum.test: Check: Mechanics {diff} — finding the part: {price} cr or a Streetwise check.
WKSH.tuning.confirm.title: Not enough hard points
WKSH.tuning.confirm.body: {name} costs {hp} hard point(s), {free} free. Force it?
WKSH.tuning.fail.title: 🔧 Installation failed — {att}
WKSH.tuning.fail.body: The Mechanics check fails: the attachment is not mounted on {item}.
WKSH.tuning.fail.despair: 💀 Despair: part lost or item damaged (GM).
WKSH.tuning.fail.hint: Try again with more time or better tools.
WKSH.tuning.card.title: 🔧 Tuning — {item}
WKSH.tuning.res.adv: → reduce the time or install one mod for free
WKSH.tuning.res.noRoll: Noted without a check — to be confirmed with a Mechanics check in play.
WKSH.tuning.done.install: {att} installed on {item}. For the full mechanics, drag the attachment from the compendium.
WKSH.tuning.warn.noAttach: {name} has no installed attachment with activatable mods. Install an attachment first (or drag one from the compendium onto the item).
WKSH.tuning.mod.title: ⚙️ Activate an attachment mod
WKSH.tuning.mod.hint: Base Average {pips}, +1 per mod already activated on this attachment. Cost: tool kit + 100 cr.
WKSH.tuning.mod.noneWarn: No mod option left on this attachment.
WKSH.tuning.modFail.title: ⚙️ Modification failed — {mod}
WKSH.tuning.modFail.body: The Mechanics check fails: the mod is not activated on {att}.
WKSH.tuning.modFail.despair: 💀 Despair: attachment damaged, one already-installed mod is deactivated (GM).
WKSH.tuning.modFail.hint: The difficulty does not increase (the mod is not installed). Try again with more time / tools.
WKSH.tuning.modCard.title: ⚙️ Modification — {item} ▸ {att}
WKSH.tuning.modCard.next: Mods activated on this attachment: {now}/{total} · next modification = {diff}
WKSH.tuning.modCard.adv: → reduced time or −1 difficulty on the next one
WKSH.tuning.att.telescope.note: Removes up to 2 {setback} due to range (long/extreme).
WKSH.tuning.att.laserSight.note: Adds {boost} to attack checks at short range.
WKSH.tuning.install.noParts: No compatible attachment for this item.
